JavaScript Boolean conversion tests for various data types like `undefined`, `null`, numbers, and strings.

- **[15.06.01.01-006.js](15.06.01.01-006.js.md)**: Tests the conversion of negative zero to a Boolean value in JavaScript.
- **[15.06.01.01-007.js](15.06.01.01-007.js.md)**: Tests the Boolean conversion of NaN to ensure it evaluates to false.
- **[15.06.01.01-008.js](15.06.01.01-008.js.md)**: Tests the conversion of a non-zero number to a Boolean true value in JavaScript.
- **[15.06.01.01-009.js](15.06.01.01-009.js.md)**: Tests the Boolean conversion of a negative integer in JavaScript.
- **[15.06.01.01-010.js](15.06.01.01-010.js.md)**: Tests the Boolean conversion of an empty string to false.
- **[15.06.01.01-011.js](15.06.01.01-011.js.md)**: Tests the conversion of a non-empty string to a Boolean true value.
- **[15.06.01.01-012.js](15.06.01.01-012.js.md)**: Tests the conversion of an empty object to a Boolean value in JavaScript.
